name: LLMNR/NBT-NS Poisoning and SMB Relay
description: Detects LLMNR/NBT-NS poisoning attacks and SMB relay attempts
query:
// Detect LLMNR/NBT-NS poisoning via network traffic
// Trigger on multiple LLMNR responses from a single non-DNS source
events from ndr_flow
where destination_port = 5355
  and protocol = "UDP"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 20
within 120 seconds
